name: bunq Bank API
what_it_does: Developer-first Dutch neobank with one of the most comprehensive banking APIs — enabling payment initiation, account management, card management, shared accounts, and real-time events for personal and business customers, with SDKs for multiple languages.
use_cases: Automating payments and money transfers for business operations via Payment API
Managing multiple sub-accounts (MoneyPots) programmatically for budget allocation
Real-time balance monitoring and transaction event webhooks for financial automation
Building personal finance apps with full read/write access to bunq accounts
Card management (virtual card creation, spending limits) for expense control
not_for: Outside EU — bunq primarily serves EU markets
High-volume merchant payment acceptance without bunq business account
Traditional enterprise banking with SWIFT, complex treasury, or credit lines
best_when: A developer or fintech in the EU needs a banking API with full account control, payment initiation, and card management from a developer-first bank.
avoid_when: You need UK-specific payment rails (FPS/CHAPS), non-EU coverage, or are building merchant payment acceptance rather than account automation.

auth.notes: API key from bunq developer portal. Three-step API key installation (device server, session server, token). Signed requests with RSA key pairs. No OAuth2 — session token model. API key bound to device fingerprint. Sandbox environment for testing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox: completely free; Production: requires bunq account (Easy Bank from €3/month)
pricing.paid_tiers: Easy Bank €3/month; Easy Money €8/month; Easy Green €18/month
pricing.notes: API access included with bunq account subscription. Developer-first bank with unusually comprehensive API. Dutch company (Amsterdam). EU banking license via DNB. Known for environmental focus and developer friendliness. API documentation is extremely detailed.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; bunq's fair use policy

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: One of the most comprehensive banking APIs — covers accounts, payments, cards, users, events, and attachments. SDKs for 6 languages. Webhook for real-time events. Excellent documentation. Three-step API key setup is complex but well-documented. Request signing adds security but complexity.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Payments have unique ID — duplicate detection for same reference. Account reads idempotent. Card operations idempotent by reference. Event reads always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Three-step API setup (device registration → session → token) is complex vs simple API key
RSA key pair signing required for all requests — security overhead in agent implementation
Session token expires — must maintain session or re-authenticate
EU only — SEPA payments; no UK FPS/CHAPS or US ACH

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. PSD2 compliant. GDPR compliant. RSA request signing for all API calls — extremely strong authentication. Device fingerprinting prevents token theft. EU banking license via DNB. API key bound to registered device. Excellent security design.
